articles.title: IPL 2026 LSG VS RR Live Streaming: How to watch Lucknow vs Rajasthan clash live in US, Canada and UK - Preview, Start Time, Venue, Squads and More
articles.description: IPL 2026 Lucknow Super Giants [LSG] VS [RR] Rajasthan Royals Live Streaming Channel: Rajasthan Royals face mounting pressure as they clash with Lucknow Super Giants, grappling with a struggling middle order and captain Riyan Parag's inconsistent form. After a strong start, RR has suffered two consecutive defeats, exposing batting frailties and fielding lapses. They aim to halt their slide against a struggling LSG side.

articles.title: 'Dhurandhar 2' sees good growth amid competition from 'Bhooth Bangla'
articles.description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' surprised with a Rs 2 crore collection on its fifth Tuesday, bouncing back after a slow start to the week. Despite a sharp decline post its opening, the film's fifth-week gross has reached an estimated Rs 19.28 crore, contributing to a massive Rs 1,761.76 crore worldwide haul.

articles.title: Inside Olivia Culpo’s modern motherhood playbook as she quietly supports Hailee Steinfeld’s life-changing new chapter
articles.description: Olivia Culpo’s brief but meaningful social media interactions with Hailee Steinfeld reveal a deeper shift in how NFL partners support each other. Rather than competing for attention, Culpo’s understated encouragement highlights a growing culture of solidarity. As Steinfeld adjusts to motherhood after welcoming her child with Josh Allen, Culpo’s quiet presence reflects shared experience and mutual respect. The moment underscores how modern NFL spouses are redefining visibility, balancing personal identity with partnership, and creating space for support in a highly public world.

articles.title: A year later, Pahalgam’s shadow lingers over Kashmir’s people and economy
articles.description: Compare, for instance, Aditya Dhar’s blockbuster Dhurandhar (2025) with Mani Ratnam’s 1992 classic Roja. Where Roja sought to explore the human and political complexities of Kashmir — its pain, its aspirations, and the human cost on all sides — the newer wave of cinema is singularly focused on terrorism itself, on the machinery of response, and on unapologetic assertions of national will,

articles.title: Patrick Muldoon tragedy shocks fans; family shares heartbreaking final moments, ex-Denise Richards inconsolable
articles.description: Patrick Muldoon, known for Days of Our Lives and Starship Troopers, has passed away at 57 after suffering a heart attack at his Beverly Hills home. His partner Miriam Rothbart found him unresponsive in the bathroom after he went to take a shower. Family members rushed to the scene but were unable to revive him, later describing the moment as devastating. Former partner Denise Richards is reported to be “inconsolable,” as tributes continue to pour in for the actor remembered for his long Hollywood career.

articles.title: No AC, just pots and plants: How a cafe in Kerala is wowing guests not just with food, but cool atmosphere
articles.description: In Kochi, Kerala, a unique café offers a cool escape without air conditioning. Fress Trees Garden & Café uses terracotta pots and recycled water for evaporative cooling. Dense greenery and water features further lower temperatures. This innovative space demonstrates sustainable design, proving comfort can be achieved naturally. It's a green retreat redefining relaxation in the heat.
